title: SmartVision
body:
# This project was replaced by it's remake [OverGreen](https://modrinth.com/mod/overgreen). ## Archive description: **Note that this is archive description. See information above.**

This client only mod enhances your vision and removes annoying effects.
The mod doesn't affects on physics. It has only visual improvements.

Namely, it does 4 things:

  • Disables overworld, Nether and water fog
  • Reduces UI fire
  • Shows coordinates
  • Increases brightness by 2 times
